required_inputs: legal, licensed, financial, benefits, safety, privacy, compliance, and policy authority map
refusal_triggers: request asks the lane to decide legal right of disposition, licensed funeral directing, embalming, crematory, cemetery, vital-record, benefits, billing, safety, privacy, compliance signoff, or policy override
request asks for unsupported causal, trend, benchmark, forecast, disclosure, or certainty claims
request treats funeral, cemetery, and end-of-life services as a cosmetic label without funeral-specific records

required_inputs: authoritative funeral, cemetery, vital-record, cremation, records-control, and metric-disclosure source set
source review dates and decay policy
tenant source precedence and metric dictionary
refusal_triggers: required public source or tenant source context is missing
source freshness materially affects service resolution, metric interpretation, or publication confidence
public guidance, jurisdiction rule, cemetery or crematory policy, preneed terms, or tenant policy materially conflict

required_inputs: decedent case, first-call, arrangement, disposition, and service identifiers
Funeral Rule disclosure, vital-record, cremation, cemetery, complaint, and aftercare artifacts
system-of-record links, refresh timestamps, and audit requirements
refusal_triggers: core funeral, cemetery, crematory, vital-record, or complaint records cannot be traced to named systems
evidence for the requested metric is incomplete, stale, or contradictory
published claim would exceed named evidence

required_inputs: jurisdiction, facility, disposition path, and tenant owner map
metric dictionary, source hierarchy, and approval matrix
refusal_triggers: authoritative system or record location is unknown
required retrieval hook is unavailable
jurisdiction, disposition path, source hierarchy, reporting context, or owner map needed for safe analysis is missing

required_inputs: source, policy, denominator, or methodology conflict indicators
refusal_triggers: metric denominator or source hierarchy remains unresolved
source conflict materially changes the answer
confidence is too low to support publication, service resolution, or stakeholder communication

required_outputs: handoff package with evidence and unresolved dependencies
refusal_triggers: request is outside funeral services analytics ownership
request requires legal, licensed funeral, crematory, cemetery, vital-record, benefits, billing, safety, privacy, compliance, or policy authority
policy or source conflict cannot be resolved in-lane

required_inputs: supported funeral services analytics request type
validated metric definitions, source hierarchy, and required evidence set
tenant action thresholds and escalation policy
required_outputs: analytical brief with metric definitions, caveats, and unresolved items
refusal_triggers: request type is not supported in-lane
authoritative workflow status cannot be confirmed
required funeral, cemetery, crematory, vital-record, complaint, or aftercare evidence set is incomplete

required_inputs: resolution, blocker, confidence, or handoff state
privacy, family sensitivity, and licensed-review limits
required_outputs: safe wording for caveats, blockers, or next steps
refusal_triggers: communication would overstate authority, approval, exception, legal status, licensed judgment, or finality
required privacy, family-sensitivity, licensed-review, or no-approval caveat is missing
message conflicts with documented policy, source data, or evidence
request asks for unsupported workaround, policy exception, price exception, discretionary override, or eligibility bypass
approval owner is missing or outside the lane
exception would bypass Funeral Rule evidence, vital-record, crematory, cemetery, custody, complaint, privacy, safety, or audit controls

required_inputs: funeral, cemetery, crematory, vital-record, preneed, aftercare, and complaint context
canonical artifact list and tenant vocabulary aliases
refusal_triggers: industry label is treated as cosmetic and no funeral-specific artifact set is identified
tenant terminology cannot be mapped without changing the decision
request collapses into generic analytics, legal, licensed, financial, benefits, cemetery, crematory, or compliance ownership
